name: Densan Co., Ltd.
summary: Densan Co., Ltd. operates as an information service company in Japan. The company offers business information systems, such as resident's information, welfare, industrial planning, and internal information systems for local governments; and private enterprise information systems, including distribution industry relations, finance business relationship, news media relations, medical care, and other systems. It also provides data center services comprising housing, network, operation and monitoring, individual operation, backup, virtual server, and cloud services; connection, rental server, and homepage creation services; and information systems planning, design, development, and maintenance services. In addition, the company is involved in the development, sales, and rental and maintenance of software; sale of information and communications, and information processing equipment, as well as its peripheral equipment and operational software; rental of information processing equipment and building space; and installation and maintenance of electrical equipment. Further, it engages in planning, research, and development of information network technology, information communication and processing equipment, and peripheral devices; plans, develops, and sells digital content; and provision of information communication and processing technology education and guidance services, and information consulting systems. Additionally, the company is involved in worker dispatch business. Densan Co., Ltd. was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Nagano, Japan.
